questionHtml: The resistance of the loop is 2.4 Ω. Calculate the magnitude of the magnetic force on the loop as it enters the region of magnetic field.
markschemeHtml:
I=«VR=»0.82.4  OR  0.33 «A» ✓

F=«NBIL=85×0.94×0.33×0.05=»=1.3 «N» ✓

 

Allow ECF from (c)(i).

Award [2] marks for a bald correct answer.
